_comment: This file contains the shared DEV Cognito pool for contributors.
The app automatically selects devamplify_outputs.json or prodamplify_outputs.json
based on USE_DEV_API in src/config/variables.local.ts — you no longer copy this
SETUP (no AWS account needed, recommended for UI/feature work):
Then set USE_DEV_API = true in src/config/variables.local.ts.
Log in with any email via OTP, or use test@yosemitecrew.com when
enableReviewLogin is active on the dev API.
This is a shared dev environment — do not store sensitive data in it.
OPTION B — Use your own AWS Amplify sandbox (isolated, requires AWS account):
Follow README Step 3 to run `npx ampx sandbox`.
Copy the generated amplify_outputs.json to devamplify_outputs.json.
Your own Cognito pool will be used instead of the shared one.
